title: state.client.as_mut().unwrap() repeated 6x; implicit precondition
description: The pattern 'state.client.as_mut().unwrap()' appears at lines 253, 267, 288, 321, 329, 338, 343. The invariant (client is Some after ensure_connected) is enforced only by call-site discipline. A future contributor who calls get_cached_or_scan or references state.client.as_mut() in a new context will get a panic with no diagnostic. Suggested rewrite: add a private fn WolfHsmState::client_mut(&mut self) -> &mut Client that panics with a descriptive message ('wolfhsm: client accessed before connect — call ensure_connected first'), or change ensure_connected to return Result<&mut Client> and thread the reference through callers. Second option is cleaner but fights the borrow checker because get_cached_or_scan also needs to mutate cached_nvm_id on the same state struct. First option (named accessor with better panic message) is the pragmatic fix.
